name: Newborn Town Inc.
summary: Newborn Town Inc., an investment holding company, operates as a mobile applications developer and mobile advertising platform services provider based on AI technologies worldwide. The company provides live streaming services through social networking platform; and mobile marketing and advertising services through various mobile applications. It also offers Solo X product matrix; Solo Math, a programmatic mobile advertising platform; and Solo Aware, an artificial intelligence (AI) engine. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
